planned.name: Pre-departure flight monitor (AirLabs)
planned.description: Day-of departure status check via AirLabs API. Flags delays >30 min, gate changes, and cancellations. Sends email alert. Runs once on each departure day.
planned.condition_human: Activates when any flight leg has booked=true
planned.note: Register manually via crontab -e on the eve of each departure. Costs AirLabs credits — one call per flight leg. Deregister after return leg.
